creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Well, it works good with /bin/sh now. And I wouldn't like to change it.
17.11.2011 23:51 횖쩔횖쩐횖쨩횗혣횖쨌횖쩐횖짼횖째횗혗횖쨉횖쨩횗혣 "Chris Rees" <crees@freebsd.org> 횖쩍횖째횖쩔횖쨍횗혖횖째횖쨩:

> No problem with the provided patch, but :
>
> @${REINPLACE_CMD} 's|/bin/bash|/bin/sh|g'
>
> rings alarm bells for me...
>
> Surely it should be ${LOCALBASE}/bin/bash, and the port DEPENDS on bash??
>
> Chris
>
